code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut a = 0
mut bv = 0
mut s = 0
mut idx = 0
mut start = 0
mut started = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(byte)
    if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 10 or byte == 13
      if started
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if idx == 0
            a = v
          else if idx == 1
            bv = v
          else if idx == 2
            s = v
          end
          idx = idx + 1
        when None
          ()
        end
        started = false
      end
    else
      if not started
        start = i
        started = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if started
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      a = v
    else if idx == 1
      bv = v
    else if idx == 2
      s = v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < bv
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
